content: I really hope you meant the latter....
how can murphy be peak gf when she's 3000 years old? <:Winkle_frustrated:1468257899330539774>
insig i really value you as a regular lorechatter but that doesn't diminish my desire to punt you into the sun
not sure if this qualifies as lore.. but in this 24 sticker whys her outfit diff?? <:24_smile:1459073862544130131>  is there a story vers with this fit or what? if so can i have the pic
MAJOR DIFFERENCE. apron thingy with big fat bow
So it’s just an apron… I’m heartbroken
now i wonder if 24 has an easier or harder time putting on clothes, since she has so many arms
(and her clothes are probably open back to accommodate it)
have u read her new skin description
yeah i did but im thinking of more than just 1 outfit
cos it does seem like her ruining her own clothes is not a common occurrence
probably depends on how cooperative the arms are
if they move how she wants they're pretty thin so i imagine they'd fit easily
Are all the awakeners technically dead?
It's either a yes or no
no, she's an awakener but never died
I think Ramona was an awakener by default
theres a few other live awakeners too like the bird twins and 24
Oh yeah! Will we meet Captain Elton again?
you get your answer by the end of ch9 and also in arc 2
you dont need a lore breakdown to write bad fanfics
question: do we have canon ages for the characters? (i need to know which ones i can accurately call unc)
if you go by actual age post-awakening, everyone can be unc except aigis and jenkin probably
no one except ramona has an actual age iirc
and its safe to assume keeper is her age more or less
theres the classic "murphy is 25" but if i say that lens will cry even though its true
miryam is in her thousands, right
or is it just her hundreds
since awakeners dont age im counting the age they died as their actual age (if they died)
live awakeners get counted by their actual age
24 is also probably a reasonable age for a young adult woman
altho itd be hilarious if murphy was older than 24
24 has a job so i hope shes an adult
then again its that era so i wouldn't be surprised at child labor either
ryker's old enough to gamble legally back when he wasnt a furry, presumably, so id assume hes also a reasonable age
iirc ryker is around 24 ish? i vaguely remember an actual number being thrown around
you heard it from the loremancer
how tf is he so well connected with the police by 25
if not nepotism i blame child labor
i did not know we had this ryker sticker
honestly the funniest lore i learned this month is that the hat is what is keeping lights cat form
and that the hat uses silver tech
without it he will turn back into a dog
whoever stole light's original account could do something really funny and use a dog pfp
oh i just noticed lights new acc username is lightproud
what happened to ur name venush 😭
we didnt build the tower of babel
We r sad we don't speak Ali express
keeper confirmed 20 on their first year of Mythag yeah
Aigis was mentioned to be 7-8, jenkins was 13-14 at time of wax museum according to her story
Oh are we doing cn/non-eng names?
why is niko japanese in the chinese game
i guess i should join the apparently april fools discord event or something????
the true fusion of the twin divus has been here the entire time, muahaha!
time to get dissoluted i guess, goodbye
my pronouns are they/them, not because im notbinary, but because im 2 bastard forced together by mama Juliette
all divi are actually related and Juliette is their biological mom
as the Ultimate Divi i can confirm
Oh fun the list looks like this too
Can someone explain why are we all otters?
When you log in a short April fools story would trigger
And there is a very gorgeous amazing CG too
do you have any idea about Caraboo letter?🥹
and I hope they won’t “update” Caraboo art
I don’t need another “We respect all our old artists works and won’t ever modify them” bullsh1t from the game
no way, blackpool is canon in the worldbuilding of morimens
